AcceptPrimaryEmailUpdate.description: Grants permission to accept the process to update the primary email address of an account

CloseAccount.description: Grants permission to close an account

DeleteAlternateContact.description: Grants permission to delete the alternate contacts for an account

DisableRegion.description: Grants permission to disable use of a Region

EnableRegion.description: Grants permission to enable use of a Region

GetAccountInformation.description: Grants permission to retrieve the account information for an account

GetAlternateContact.description: Grants permission to retrieve the alternate contacts for an account

GetContactInformation.description: Grants permission to retrieve the primary contact information for an account

GetGovCloudAccountInformation.description: Grants permission to retrieve the linked GovCloud account information for an account

GetPrimaryEmail.description: Grants permission to retrieve the primary email address of an account

GetRegionOptStatus.description: Grants permission to get the opt-in status of a Region

ListRegions.description: Grants permission to list the available Regions

PutAccountName.description: Grants permission to update the name for an account

PutAlternateContact.description: Grants permission to modify the alternate contacts for an account

PutContactInformation.description: Grants permission to update the primary contact information for an account

StartPrimaryEmailUpdate.description: Grants permission to start the process to update the primary email address of an account

account:AccountResourceOrgPaths.description: Filters access by the resource path for an account in an organization

account:AccountResourceOrgTags/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by resource tags for an account in an organization

account:AlternateContactTypes.description: Filters access by alternate contact types

account:EmailTargetDomain.description: Filters access by email domain of the target email address

account:TargetRegion.description: Filters access by a list of Regions. Enables or disables all the Regions specified here
